creator: reuben.brown@online.no
text:
Compaq Deskpro EN 6400
Compaq BIOS Date July 3, 1999
Compaq ATAPI CDROM has the new drive shadowing specification
ATAPI CDROM is Cable Select Master on the second IDE Controller IRQ 15

How-To-Repeat: Reproduceable on stock Compaq Deskpro EN Series Desktop 
PCs purchased within the last 6 months.
